response.justification: Bogdan is an exceptionally strong full-stack engineer with 14+ years of relevant experience, significantly exceeding the 6+ year requirement. He demonstrates proven expertise in the primary stack (TypeScript, Node.js, React), with a deep commitment to testing and code quality that aligns perfectly with the role's needs. His recent role at re:cinq includes direct AI-agent infrastructure work with MCP code generators, addressing a specific technical requirement. The main gaps—Nest.js, Vitest, and Playwright not explicitly mentioned—are relatively minor for someone with his depth and demonstrated ability to master new technologies. His recent career gap requires clarification but doesn't offset his strong overall fit.
strengths: 14+ years full-stack experience far exceeding requirements, with current proficiency in TypeScript, Node.js, React, and MongoDB across multiple senior roles
Exceptional testing and code quality focus demonstrated through TDD adoption, creation of testing libraries (Fluent-Asserts), and proven CI/CD infrastructure expertise
Recent direct AI-agent development experience at re:cinq working with MCP code generators and agentic frameworks, specifically addressing the AI agent development requirement
concerns: Nest.js not explicitly mentioned despite being listed as primary stack; while Node.js and TypeScript expertise are strong, specific Nest.js experience is unclear
Unexamined 7-month career gap (October 2025–May 2026) with minimal explanation; requires discussion about circumstances and current availability
Missing explicit mentions of several required technologies: Vitest, Playwright, PostgreSQL (though MongoDB and general SQL skills are present), and Kotlin

key_factors.factor: Depth of full-stack experience and technical breadth
Unexplained recent career gap and missing specific tech stack mentions
